privileged_info_summary: The input file T8_housing_bracket.FCStd (33,868 bytes) is a real FreeCAD PartDesign model from the FreeCAD parts library, created by @hasecilu with CC-BY-4.0 license on 2022-03-22. The file is a valid FCStd (ZIP format) containing a T8 lead screw housing bracket model with parametric features (Pad, Hole, Pocket, PolarPattern) and no TechDraw content. The task requires creating a TechDraw drawing page with orthographic projection views and exporting to PDF. Expected output files are T8_bracket_drawing.FCStd and T8_bracket_drawing.pdf. The scoring system allocates 100 total points across 8 criteria (FCStd validity, page existence, views, projection groups, templates, PDF export, PDF content, and anti-gaming checks). The minimum PDF size threshold is 5000 bytes. All file paths are specified. The data source is authentic and represents real mechanical engineering content.
